channel.title: All Channel
channel.loadErrorLog: Failed to load team chat messages
channel.empty: No messages yet — start a conversation with your team!

input.newHeader: Send a message to the team
input.shortcutHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline; type @ to mention members

send.error: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

message.pinError: Action failed. Please try again later.
message.deleteError: Delete failed. Please try again later.

announcement.title: Post Announcement
announcement.description: Announcements pin to the top of the chat with special styling so team members can spot important messages.
announcement.error: Failed to post announcement. Please try again later.

sidebar.noMentions: No patient-board mentions for you yet

header.title: AI Assistant
header.removePatientContext: Remove patient context (switch to general Q&A)

context.multiPatientNotice: You selected {{count}} patients, but multi-patient Q&A is in development. Only the first patient is loaded as context.
context.disclaimer: This is a general medical assistant with no patient context; do not enter identifiable PHI (name/MRN).

session.newSessionHintBottom: asking AI about general medical questions

mode.noContext: No patient context · do not enter PHI

input.placeholder: e.g. SGLT2 inhibitor recommendations in heart failure?
input.shortcutHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · Press Stop while generating
input.charLimitReached: Character limit reached — pasted content will be truncated

deleteDialog.title: Delete chat session
deleteDialog.description: This cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete?

toasts.stopBeforeNew: Press Stop before starting a new chat
toasts.stopBeforeRefresh: Press Stop before refreshing the snapshot
toasts.stopBeforeDelete: Press Stop before deleting the session

snapshot.label: Snapshot {{age}}
snapshot.tooltipStale: Snapshot is older than 30 minutes; refresh so the LLM doesn't reason on stale data
